steps.title: Spot the stated goal
steps.content: The student explicitly wants to emphasize the location of the first synchrotron. This is the specific criterion for evaluating which choice works best.

steps.title: Find which choice emphasizes location
steps.content:
Choice C includes the location detail (near the University of Wisconsin–Madison) and makes it the main point.

The other choices all omit or deprioritize the location —
  • A highlights the year
  • B discusses synchrotron properties unrelated to location
  • D emphasizes brightness
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
